The degrees of the concerned navamsa at conception is
proportioned to the time that has elapsed from Sunrise to the
time of birth. Each navamsa has 200 liptas which are equal to

12()()() viliptas, or 720000 anuliptas or grades. The day has
sixty ghatis or twenty four hours.

This is how we have to find out the moment of birth from
the chart at the time of the sex act. How to know which
moment of which coitus made the womau conceive?
Take an example. The ascendant atAdhana is 4 deg. . 20' in
Aries. The degreeofthe second navamsa is over. It is equal to
216000 anuliptas. The horas (hours) which elapsed after Sun
rise till birth will be:
216000 36
- =Seven hours, twelve minutes.
30000 5
This depends on the accuracy of Adhana lagna.
The seventh sutra may be explained in a different way.
